title: [trustless://interop.landscape] Workshop - The Art of AMM
description:
This workshop by Anton Bukov (1inch, Co-founder) goes into how DEX aggregators transformed interoperability on the taker side. It discusses new levels of integration for makers, and explores a novel DeFi architecture to create whole new levels of composability.

Workshop given during day 2 of the trustless:// conference at Devconnect Argentina 2025

https://trustlessconference.com
